CONTENT.Career: In May 2018, Kwarteng signed his first professional contract with Hamburger SV, lasting for three years until 30 June 2021. He made his professional debut for Hamburg in the 2. Bundesliga on 10 May 2021, coming on as a substitute in the 82nd minute for David Kinsombi against 1. FC Nürnberg. The home match finished as a 5–2 win for Hamburg.On 21 January 2022, Kwarteng signed with 1. FC Magdeburg.On 22 June 2023, Kwarteng moved to 1. Bundesliga club VfL Bochum. He signed a contract until 30 June 2027.
CONTENT.Personal life: Kwarteng was born in Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg and is of Ghanaian descent.
CONTENT.External links: Moritz Kwarteng at DFB (also available in German)Moritz Kwarteng at kicker (in German)Moritz Kwarteng at Soccerway

SUMMARY: Moritz-Broni Kwarteng (born 28 April 1998) is a German professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for VfL Bochum.
